title: centaurea jacea var. microptilon
intro: Centaurea jacea var. microptilon, also known as lesser knapweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent. The health benefits of Centaurea jacea var. microptilon include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and its ability to help soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in the production of traditional herbal remedies.
